Philosophy
"Disease is not destiny. Every cell in your body is listening to the signals you send — through food, movement, sleep, and purpose."

— Dr. Noé Palafox Torres

The Orión Method

The new medicine is not solving issues — it is to prevent them and avoid irreversible outcomes.

Biohacking

I

Precision Diagnosis

We begin with comprehensive metabolic analysis. No guesswork. Only evidence-based clarity.

II

Personalized Protocol

Every intervention tailored to your genetic predispositions, lifestyle, and goals.

III

Sustained Transformation

Ongoing monitoring and refinements ensure results compound over time.

How It Works

Your Path to Metabolic Reconfiguration

I

Initial Consultation

A deep-dive 90-minute session covering your full medical history.

II

Advanced Diagnostics

Comprehensive lab panels and biomarker analysis for your unique baseline.

III

Personalized Protocol

A custom health blueprint within 7 days.

IV

Ongoing Optimization

Monthly check-ins and continuous protocol refinement.

© 2026 Orión Médica · All rights reserved

Nuevo Laredo, Tamaulipas, México

Privacy Policy — Last Updated: June 4, 2026

Controller: Orión Médica, operated by Dr. Noé Palafox Torres, Calle Gonzalez 5919, Col. Hidalgo, Nuevo Laredo, Tamaulipas, México. Contact: drnoepalafoxtorres@gmail.com · +52 867 231 6693 · +1 956 394 7495.

Data We Collect

When you submit the consultation form we collect your first name, last name, email address, phone number, program of interest, and health goals you voluntarily share. This site sets no tracking cookies and runs no third-party analytics.

How We Use It

Solely to respond to your consultation request, schedule appointments, and provide medically relevant information. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for marketing.

Legal Bases (GDPR)

Processing is based on your consent (Art. 6(1)(a)) at form submission and our legitimate interest in responding to medical inquiries (Art. 6(1)(f)).

Retention

We retain your information only as long as needed to provide the requested service or as required by applicable law.

Your Rights

  • EU / GDPR: Access, rectify, erase, restrict, port your data; right to object; lodge a complaint with your supervisory authority.
  • California / CCPA: Know what we collect, request deletion, opt out of sale. We do not sell personal information.
  • Mexico / LFPDPPP: ARCO rights — Access, Rectification, Cancellation, Opposition. Email drnoepalafoxtorres@gmail.com.

Cookies & Local Storage

No tracking or analytics cookies are used. Browser localStorage is used solely to prevent duplicate form submissions; timestamps remain on your device and are never transmitted.

Aviso de Privacidad — Actualizado: 4 de junio de 2026

Responsable: Orión Médica, bajo la dirección del Dr. Noé Palafox Torres, Calle Gonzalez 5919, Col. Hidalgo, Nuevo Laredo, Tamaulipas, México. Contacto: drnoepalafoxtorres@gmail.com · +52 867 231 6693 · +1 956 394 7495.

Datos Personales Recabados

Al enviar el formulario de consulta recabamos su nombre, apellido, correo electrónico, teléfono, programa de interés y los objetivos de salud que proporcione voluntariamente. Este sitio no utiliza cookies de rastreo ni analíticas de terceros.

Finalidades del Tratamiento

Dar seguimiento a su solicitud de consulta, agendar citas y proporcionarle información sobre nuestros servicios médicos. Sus datos no serán transferidos a terceros con fines comerciales o publicitarios.

Transferencias

Sus datos personales no serán transferidos a terceros sin su consentimiento previo, salvo disposición legal o requerimiento de autoridad competente.

Derechos ARCO

Conforme a la LFPDPPP usted tiene derecho a Acceder, Rectificar, Cancelar u Oponerse al tratamiento de sus datos. Envíe su solicitud a drnoepalafoxtorres@gmail.com.

Cookies y Almacenamiento Local

No se utilizan cookies de rastreo ni analíticas. El almacenamiento local del navegador se usa únicamente para evitar envíos duplicados del formulario; las marcas de tiempo se almacenan solo en su dispositivo y nunca se transmiten.

Derechos Adicionales

Los residentes de la UE tienen derechos bajo el RGPD (acceso, supresión, portabilidad). Los residentes de California tienen derechos bajo la CCPA. No vendemos información personal.
